title: Zillow's Mortgage Revenue Up 36% on Purchase Volume Growth
text: Zillow Mortgage Business Revenue Growth Analysis. Mortgage Segment Performance: Zillow's mortgage revenue grew 36% year-over-year to $53 million in Q3 2025. This strong growth outpaced the broader mortgage industry, demonstrating significant market share gains. Purchase Volume Growth: Purchase loan originations surged 57% year-over-year in Q3 2025, indicating strong momentum in the purchase mortgage market. The company's mortgage origination volume reached $812 million in Q3 2024 and $1.5 billion in Q1 2026. Market Share Dynamics: Despite the overall mortgage market remaining challenged by elevated interest rates, Zillow gained significant market share. This suggests the company's technology, user experience, and mortgage product offering are compelling to borrowers. Business Model: Zillow's mortgage business operates through two channels: Direct lending through Zillow Home Loans. Mortgage marketplace where consumers compare rates. Product Innovation: The company has enhanced AI integration into its mortgage products, enabling faster rate quotes and improved user experience. This technology advantage has been key to driving volume growth. Future Outlook: Management expects continued double-digit growth in the mortgage segment as the company expands marketing and geographic reach. The mortgages business is projected to be a key driver of consolidated revenue growth.
